Platform Products Solutions Why SYAG Pricing
Request a demo

Build technology that keeps communities safe.

SYAG is an early-stage product with a clear mission, a working platform, and a market that nobody else is serving. If you want to build something that matters — and build it with people who care about craft — we'd like to talk.

What we're building

We're building SYAG — a cloud-native PSIM SaaS for MEA gated communities and managed facilities. The platform is production-built on .NET 10, PostgreSQL, React, and Azure. We care deeply about architecture, code quality, and building things that genuinely work for the people who use them.

Open roles

  • Senior Backend Engineer — .NET / C#
  • Frontend Engineer — React / TypeScript
  • Mobile Engineer — React Native / Android

Product & Design

  • Product Designer — Security Operations UX

Customer Success

  • Customer Success Manager — GCC
  • Technical Implementation Specialist

Sales

  • Regional Sales Manager — KSA / UAE

All roles subject to availability. Listed positions may be filled — contact us to confirm.

Small team, high ownership, fast decisions

We ship, we learn, we improve

Send us a note anyway. We're always interested in people who care about what we're building.
